base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mario — a character (playable) from 1992 super mario kart. Mario — 8-direction kart-rotation sprite + jump/spin/KO poses. Balanced stats. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
